description: Out-of-scope (ocd, edge-checking): description points clearly to ocd territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'ocd'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: I can't leave the house without checking the stove seven times. If something interrupts me I have to start over from the beginning. Same with the door — locked, unlocked, locked, unlocked, until it feels right. My partner thinks I'm being weird but I genuinely can't stop.
